failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'italian & restaurant')
  AND pub.published_at >= '2025-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND pub.published_at <= '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
  AND (pub.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'menu'))
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'italian & restaurant')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
for SELECT DISTINCT, ORDER BY expressions must appear in select list
LINE 8: ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', ...
                 ^

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS profile_id,
       ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'italian & restaurant')) AS rank
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'italian & restaurant')
  AND pub.published_at >= '2025-01-01'
  AND pub.published_at < '2026-01-01'
  AND pub.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'menu')
GROUP BY p.id, p.biography_lexemes
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
